description: RouterOS アクセス先統計。passive DNS (sniffer) と netflow (traffic-flow, TCP/UDP のみ) を answer_ip⋈dst_ip で時間窓 join (client優先→IP fallback, 24h last-seen) し、クライアント別のアクセス先ドメインと帯域を可視化。ipipv6 トンネル transport・ICMP 等の非 L4 は除外。silver 直読み (DuckDB/MyDuck datasource)。設計: dotfiles-private#326。v2 (#348): 未帰属 ~20% を IP→ASN/org (iptoasn, reference/asn/asn.parquet を inet range join) で組織/国別に characterize、coalesce(domain, org) で補完。

panels.title: アクセス先統計 (passive-DNS ⋈ netflow, dotfiles-private#326)

panels.description: 実 L4 (TCP/UDP) 外部トラフィック bytes のうちドメイン名が付いた割合 (client優先→IP fallback, 24h last-seen join)。非 L4 (ipipv6 トンネル transport・ICMP) は除外済。残りは passive DNS に一度も現れない宛先 = DoH/DoT 迂回・直 IP (ゲーム/P2P/WebRTC)。この未帰属分は下部 v2 セクション (GeoIP/ASN enrich) で組織/国別に特性化する。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT max(flow_ts) AS time, 100.0*sum(CASE WHEN qname IS NOT NULL THEN bytes ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(sum(bytes),0) AS value FROM att

panels.title: DNS 帰属率 (named bytes %)

panels.description: LAN クライアント ↔ 外部の実 L4 (TCP/UDP) 総バイト (上り+下り)。内部 (LAN 内/router) flow と非 L4 (トンネル/ICMP) は除外。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT max(flow_ts) AS time, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att

panels.title: 外部トラフィック総量 (range)

panels.description: passive DNS で観測した distinct qname 数 (RouterOS リゾルバ経由)。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(ts) AS time, count(DISTINCT qname)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: 観測ドメイン数 (distinct qname)

panels.description: DNS を引いた distinct LAN クライアント数。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(ts) AS time, count(DISTINCT client_ip)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: アクティブクライアント数

panels.description: 実 L4 外部トラフィックを named/unnamed で日次 stack。unnamed (passive DNS 非経由) の比率が DoH/DoT・直 IP (ゲーム/P2P) の規模を示す。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT date_trunc('day', flow_ts) AS time, CASE WHEN qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'named (DNS解決済)' ELSE 'unnamed (迂回/直IP)' END AS metric, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: 日次トラフィック: named vs unnamed (stacked bytes)

panels.description: ドメイン別の総バイト (上り+下り、両方向 join)。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT qname, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes, count(*)::BIGINT AS flows FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY qname ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 宛先ドメイン ランキング (bytes)

panels.description: どの LAN クライアントがどのドメインへ何バイト通信したか。client優先 join のため大半は実 client の解決だが、共有 CDN IP は他 client の解決で名付く場合あり。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
SELECT client_ip, qname, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY client_ip, qname ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: クライアント × ドメイン (bytes)

panels.description: 総バイト上位 10 ドメインの日次帯域。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
)
, top AS (SELECT qname FROM att WHERE qname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY qname ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT date_trunc('day', flow_ts) AS time, qname AS metric, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM att WHERE qname IN (SELECT qname FROM top) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: Top-10 ドメイン 帯域推移 (日次)

panels.description: 実 L4 外部 bytes のうち domain (passive DNS) または org (ASN) のいずれかで宛先が判明した割合。DNS 帰属率 (上部) に ASN enrich を coalesce で足した実効カバレッジ。実測ほぼ 100% (未帰属は AS 未割当の僅少 IP のみ)。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
asn AS (
  SELECT range_start, range_end, org, nullif(country, 'None') AS country FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/reference/asn/asn.parquet') WHERE asn <> 0
),
ip_org AS (
  SELECT i.remote, any_value(g.org) AS org, any_value(g.country) AS country
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT remote FROM flows_ext) i
  LEFT JOIN asn g ON i.remote::INET BETWEEN g.range_start::INET AND g.range_end::INET
  GROUP BY i.remote
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.remote, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
),
attg AS (
  SELECT att.flow_ts, att.client_ip, att.remote, att.bytes, att.qname,
         o.org, o.country,
         coalesce(att.qname, NULLIF(o.org, ''), '(unknown)') AS dest,
         CASE WHEN att.qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain'
              WHEN NULLIF(o.org, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'org'
              ELSE 'unknown' END AS dest_kind
  FROM att LEFT JOIN ip_org o ON att.remote = o.remote
)
SELECT max(flow_ts) AS time, 100.0*sum(CASE WHEN dest_kind <> 'unknown' THEN bytes ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(sum(bytes),0) AS value FROM attg

panels.title: 帰属率: domain+org 合算 (bytes %)

panels.description: 未帰属トラフィック (DoH 解決済 HTTPS・ゲーム/P2P 直 IP) を含む全外部 flow を、IP→ASN org で組織別に集計。passive DNS に名前が出ない CDN/クラウド (Google/Cloudflare/Akamai 等) もここで可視化される。データ: iptoasn.com。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
asn AS (
  SELECT range_start, range_end, org, nullif(country, 'None') AS country FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/reference/asn/asn.parquet') WHERE asn <> 0
),
ip_org AS (
  SELECT i.remote, any_value(g.org) AS org, any_value(g.country) AS country
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT remote FROM flows_ext) i
  LEFT JOIN asn g ON i.remote::INET BETWEEN g.range_start::INET AND g.range_end::INET
  GROUP BY i.remote
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.remote, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
),
attg AS (
  SELECT att.flow_ts, att.client_ip, att.remote, att.bytes, att.qname,
         o.org, o.country,
         coalesce(att.qname, NULLIF(o.org, ''), '(unknown)') AS dest,
         CASE WHEN att.qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain'
              WHEN NULLIF(o.org, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'org'
              ELSE 'unknown' END AS dest_kind
  FROM att LEFT JOIN ip_org o ON att.remote = o.remote
)
SELECT coalesce(NULLIF(org,''),'(AS未割当/不明)') AS org, any_value(country) AS country, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes, count(*)::BIGINT AS flows FROM attg GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 組織別 帯域 (ASN org, bytes)

panels.description: ASN の登録国別の帯域。注意: これは AS 登録国であって IP の地理的 serving 位置ではない (例: Akamai が NL と出る)。厳密な geo 国別が要件化したら reference/geo/ に GeoLite2 Country を別 parquet で追加する想定。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
asn AS (
  SELECT range_start, range_end, org, nullif(country, 'None') AS country FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/reference/asn/asn.parquet') WHERE asn <> 0
),
ip_org AS (
  SELECT i.remote, any_value(g.org) AS org, any_value(g.country) AS country
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT remote FROM flows_ext) i
  LEFT JOIN asn g ON i.remote::INET BETWEEN g.range_start::INET AND g.range_end::INET
  GROUP BY i.remote
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.remote, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
),
attg AS (
  SELECT att.flow_ts, att.client_ip, att.remote, att.bytes, att.qname,
         o.org, o.country,
         coalesce(att.qname, NULLIF(o.org, ''), '(unknown)') AS dest,
         CASE WHEN att.qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain'
              WHEN NULLIF(o.org, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'org'
              ELSE 'unknown' END AS dest_kind
  FROM att LEFT JOIN ip_org o ON att.remote = o.remote
)
SELECT coalesce(NULLIF(country,''),'(不明)') AS country, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes, count(DISTINCT remote)::BIGINT AS ips FROM attg GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: 国別 帯域 (ASN登録国・近似, bytes)

panels.description: 総バイト上位 10 組織 (ASN org) の日次帯域。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
asn AS (
  SELECT range_start, range_end, org, nullif(country, 'None') AS country FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/reference/asn/asn.parquet') WHERE asn <> 0
),
ip_org AS (
  SELECT i.remote, any_value(g.org) AS org, any_value(g.country) AS country
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT remote FROM flows_ext) i
  LEFT JOIN asn g ON i.remote::INET BETWEEN g.range_start::INET AND g.range_end::INET
  GROUP BY i.remote
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.remote, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
),
attg AS (
  SELECT att.flow_ts, att.client_ip, att.remote, att.bytes, att.qname,
         o.org, o.country,
         coalesce(att.qname, NULLIF(o.org, ''), '(unknown)') AS dest,
         CASE WHEN att.qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain'
              WHEN NULLIF(o.org, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'org'
              ELSE 'unknown' END AS dest_kind
  FROM att LEFT JOIN ip_org o ON att.remote = o.remote
)
, toporg AS (SELECT coalesce(NULLIF(org,''),'(unknown)') AS org FROM attg GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT date_trunc('day', flow_ts) AS time, coalesce(NULLIF(org,''),'(unknown)') AS metric, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS value FROM attg WHERE coalesce(NULLIF(org,''),'(unknown)') IN (SELECT org FROM toporg) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: Top-10 組織 帯域推移 (日次)

panels.description: 宛先を coalesce(domain, org) で補完したランキング。domain (passive DNS で名前が付いた分) を優先し、付かなかった分は ASN org で埋める。kind 列で domain/org の別が分かる。issue #348 の『ドメインランキングを coalesce(domain, org) 補完』に対応。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pd AS (
  SELECT ts AS dns_ts, client_ip, qname, answer_ip FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=passive-dns/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),
nf AS (
  SELECT ts AS flow_ts, src_ip, dst_ip, bytes FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/silver/source=netflow/date=*/logs.parquet', hive_partitioning=true)
  WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND proto IN ('Tcp', 'Udp')
),
flows AS (
  SELECT flow_ts, src_ip AS client, dst_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
  UNION ALL
  SELECT flow_ts, dst_ip AS client, src_ip AS remote, bytes FROM nf
),
flows_ext AS (
  SELECT * FROM flows
  WHERE NOT (remote LIKE '192.168.%' OR remote LIKE '10.%' OR remote LIKE '240b:%' OR remote = '114.17.55.115')
),
asn AS (
  SELECT range_start, range_end, org, nullif(country, 'None') AS country FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/reference/asn/asn.parquet') WHERE asn <> 0
),
ip_org AS (
  SELECT i.remote, any_value(g.org) AS org, any_value(g.country) AS country
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT remote FROM flows_ext) i
  LEFT JOIN asn g ON i.remote::INET BETWEEN g.range_start::INET AND g.range_end::INET
  GROUP BY i.remote
),
att AS (
  SELECT f.flow_ts, f.client AS client_ip, f.remote, f.bytes,
    CASE WHEN s.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN s.qname
         WHEN a.dns_ts >= f.flow_ts - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN a.qname END AS qname
  FROM flows_ext f
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd s ON f.client = s.client_ip AND f.remote = s.answer_ip AND s.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
  ASOF LEFT JOIN pd a ON f.remote = a.answer_ip AND a.dns_ts <= f.flow_ts
),
attg AS (
  SELECT att.flow_ts, att.client_ip, att.remote, att.bytes, att.qname,
         o.org, o.country,
         coalesce(att.qname, NULLIF(o.org, ''), '(unknown)') AS dest,
         CASE WHEN att.qname IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain'
              WHEN NULLIF(o.org, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'org'
              ELSE 'unknown' END AS dest_kind
  FROM att LEFT JOIN ip_org o ON att.remote = o.remote
)
SELECT dest, any_value(dest_kind) AS kind, sum(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes, count(*)::BIGINT AS flows FROM attg WHERE dest <> '(unknown)' GROUP BY dest ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 宛先ランキング (coalesce domain→org, bytes)

title: Logs Archive - RouterOS Access Stats
